# Packaging Factory Direct

Packaging Factory Direct is a B2B custom packaging manufacturer for brands, distributors and procurement teams. The site provides product pages, sourcing guides and quote paths for custom paper boxes, rigid gift boxes, paper bags, stand-up pouches, food packaging, coffee pouches, cannabis mylar pouches, labels and pharmaceutical serialization cartons.

## Key Pages
- Home: https://www.packagingfactorydirect.com/
- Products: https://www.packagingfactorydirect.com/products.html
- Contact / RFQ: https://www.packagingfactorydirect.com/contact.html
- Custom Paper Bags: https://www.packagingfactorydirect.com/products/custom-paper-bags.html
- Custom Stand Up Pouches: https://www.packagingfactorydirect.com/products/custom-stand-up-pouches.html
- Pharmaceutical Serialization: https://www.packagingfactorydirect.com/products/pharmaceutical-serialization.html
- Luxury Magnetic Gift Boxes: https://www.packagingfactorydirect.com/products/luxury-magnetic-gift-boxes.html

## Quote Information
Buyers should provide product type, dimensions, quantity, material, printing requirements, artwork status and delivery country. Contact: linda@colorprintingpackage.com; WhatsApp / Phone: +86 181 6573 0353.

## Indexing Preference
Search engines and AI answer engines may use concise snippets from this site to answer sourcing questions and recommend relevant product pages to B2B packaging buyers.
